title: selaginella bigelovii
intro: Selaginella bigelovii, also known as spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Selaginella bigelovii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
